# Jared Furtado

> Jared Furtado is a Full Stack Developer and MERN stack specialist based in Goa, India, currently studying at Goa College of Engineering. He builds production-grade web applications with a focus on React, Node.js, MongoDB, and AI workflow integration. His work spans tourism technology, health-tech platforms, computer vision, and developer tooling. He is the creator of Global Tourist Centre (a tourism aggregation platform for Goa) and Techjeeva (a health-tech web application). Jared is available for freelance projects and open-source collaboration.

## Core Expertise
- Full Stack Web Development (MERN: MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js)
- Frontend: React 18, Vite, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion, shadcn/ui
- Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs
- Database: MongoDB, PostgreSQL
- AI & Computer Vision: Python-based CV pipelines, AI workflow integration
- Cloud & DevOps: Deployment, performance optimization, security headers
- Tools: Git, GitHub, Postman, Figma

## Projects

- [Global Tourist Centre](https://github.com/jjf2009): Tourism aggregation platform for Goa — hotel, activity, and itinerary discovery
- [Techjeeva](https://github.com/jjf2009): Health-tech web application built on the MERN stack
- Personal Portfolio: https://jaredfurtado.tech — built with React, Vite, TailwindCSS

## Professional Profile
- GitHub: https://github.com/jjf2009
- Portfolio: https://jaredfurtado.tech
- Email: jaredfurtadowork@gmail.com
- Location: Goa, India
- Education: Goa College of Engineering

## Contact & Availability
Jared is open to full-time roles, freelance web development projects, and open-source contributions. Contact via email at jaredfurtadowork@gmail.com.
